PARAM.description: bandwidth must be a double value
PARAM.assertion: assert receiverObjectID.bandwidth instanceof java.lang.Double && receiverObjectID.Bandwidth != null;
PARAM.name: bandwidth
PARAM.content: when computing the loess fit at a particular point, this fraction of source points closest to the current point is taken into account for computing a least-squares regression.

PARAM.description: robustnessIters must be an int value
PARAM.assertion: assert receiverObjectID.RobustnessIters instanceof java.lang.Integer && receiverObjectID.RobustnessIters != null;
PARAM.name: robustnessIters
PARAM.content: This many robustness iterations are done. A sensible value is usually 0 (just the initial fit without any robustness iterations) to 4, the default value is {@link #DEFAULT_ROBUSTNESS_ITERS}.

PARAM.description: bandwidth must be in the interval [0,1]
PARAM.name: bandwidth
PARAM.content: A sensible value is usually 0.25 to 0.5, the default value is {@link #DEFAULT_BANDWIDTH}.

PARAM.name: robustnessIters
PARAM.content: A sensible value is usually 0 (just the initial fit without any robustness iterations) to 4, the default value is {@link #DEFAULT_ROBUSTNESS_ITERS}.

THROWS.description: bandwidth does not lie in the interval [0,1].
THROWS.name: OutOfRangeException
THROWS.content: when computing the loess fit at a particular point, this fraction of source points closest to the current point is taken into account for computing a least-squares regression.

THROWS.name: NotPositiveException
THROWS.content: A sensible value is usually 0 (just the initial fit without any robustness iterations) to 4, the default value is LoessInterpolator.DEFAULT_ROBUSTNESS_ITERS.

PARAM.name: xval
PARAM.content: the arguments for the interpolation points
PARAM.description: the arguments for the interpolation points

PARAM.name: yval
PARAM.content: the values for the interpolation points
PARAM.description: the values for the interpolation points

RETURN.description: The interpolated function is a cubic spline built upon a loess fit to the data at the original abscissae.
RETURN.assertion: assert result instanceof PolynomialSplineFunction && result.getPolynomial() != null && result.getPolynomial().size() == 3;
RETURN.content: The interpolated function is a cubic spline built upon a loess fit to the data at the original abscissae.

THROWS.description: if xval not sorted in strictly increasing order.
THROWS.name: NonMonotonicSequenceException
THROWS.content: if xval not sorted in strictly increasing order.

THROWS.description: if xval and yval have different sizes.
THROWS.name: DimensionMismatchException
THROWS.content: if xval and yval have different sizes.

THROWS.description: if xval or yval has zero size.
THROWS.name: NoDataException
THROWS.content: if xval or yval has zero size.

THROWS.description: if any of the arguments and values are not finite real numbers.
THROWS.name: NotFiniteNumberException
THROWS.content: if any of the arguments and values are not finite real numbers.

THROWS.description: if the bandwidth is too small to accomodate the size of the input data.
THROWS.name: NumberIsTooSmallException
THROWS.content: if the bandwidth is too small to accomodate the size of the input data.

PARAM.description: xval must be a finite real number
PARAM.name: xval

PARAM.description: yval must be a finite real number
PARAM.name: yval

PARAM.description: weights must be a finite real number
PARAM.name: weights
